task_completion.description: Open the target image containing the white shape.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GIMP (or another image editor) is open with the 'geometric_shapes.png' image loaded, displaying a light gray background and a white circle in the center.

task_completion.description: Select the Bucket Fill tool and a bright color.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bucket Fill tool is selected in the toolbox, and a bright color (e.g., red, yellow, bright blue) is set as the active foreground color in the color swatch.

task_completion.description: Fill the white circle with the bright color.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The central white circle in the image canvas is now completely filled with the selected bright color. The circular boundary is respected, and the rest of the image remains unchanged.

task_completion.description: Save or export the modified image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent uses the Save As or Export dialog to save the image to the Desktop (e.g., as 'flood_filled_shape.png', 'geometric_shapes_filled.png', or similar), or the new file is visible on the Desktop.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The modifications were made using the GIMP GUI tools (Bucket Fill), not by running terminal commands like ImageMagick to alter the image.

integrity.description: The agent used a fill tool rather than manually painting the shape.
integrity.visual_evidence: The filled shape has clean, perfect boundaries consistent with a bucket fill operation, rather than messy or uneven edges that would result from manual brush painting.

integrity.description: Only the target shape was filled.
integrity.visual_evidence: The background and other geometric shapes in the image retain their original colors; only the central white circle changed color.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target image is 'geometric_shapes.png' on the Desktop (800x600 pixels, light gray background). The target shape is a white circle at the center (radius 100px). The task requires filling this white circle with a bright color using the GIMP Bucket Fill tool. The fill must be localized (≤3 separate regions), substantial (≥500 pixels), and respect the circular boundary (compactness ≥0.3, aspect ratio ≤3:1). The final image must be saved to the Desktop (acceptable names include 'flood_filled_shape.png', 'geometric_shapes_filled.png', etc.).
